section_miscategorizations.text: The patient's congestive heart failure is being managed with increased lisinopril to 40mg daily and initiation of lasix at 20mg daily.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This sentence describes specific medication management actions (dose increase and initiation of a new medication), which are treatment changes and belong in the Plan rather than the Assessment.

The Objective section already documents an echocardiogram result, so this statement appears to refer to the same test as if it were a new order. As written, it conflicts with the existing completed study and is misleading as a plan item.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient's hypertension is being addressed with medication adherence.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This mixes assessment of the problem with a management strategy (focusing on adherence). The adherence intervention component is a plan element and would be clearer in the Plan, though the sentence is partly acceptable as assessment.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient's congestive heart failure is being managed with increased lisinopril to 40mg daily and initiation of lasix at 20mg daily.
section_miscategorizations.reason: In addition to being a plan element, the description of current medication regimen could also be considered an objective treatment status rather than an assessment impression.
